category: Special & Experimental Weapons — Other Axis Powers

weapons.name: AB 250/2 Italian Air Torpedo Variant
weapons.description: Italian cluster bomb container carrying multiple small anti-personnel or incendiary submunitions. Used by the Regia Aeronautica in North Africa and the Mediterranean.

weapons.name: Romanian Oil-Field Demolition Systems
weapons.description: As the Red Army approached Ploiești in August 1944, Romania had prepared comprehensive demolition systems for its oil fields (which had supplied 35% of Germany's refined oil). Romania's armistice with the Allies on 23 August 1944 meant these systems were never fully activated, costing Germany its last major domestic oil supply.

weapons.name: A-Stoff / C-Stoff rocket fuel (Hungarian-supplied)
weapons.description: Hungarian chemical industry supplied components for Germany's rocket fuel programme, including methanol and other precursors for the V-2 rocket. Hungary's industrial contribution to German advanced weapons is largely unacknowledged in standard histories.
